hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if ($args[0] -match '\.(env|pem|key|secret|credentials|token)$') { Write-Error 'BLOCKED: tentativa de editar arquivo sensível'; exit 1 }"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "if ($input -match '(AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY|AWS_SESSION_TOKEN|PRIVATE.KEY|password\s*=\s*[^$])') { Write-Warning 'WARNING: possível segredo detectado no output do comando' }"
